meta.title: Ahmed Othman | Robotics & Physical AI Engineer
meta.description: Ahmed Othman's portfolio in robotics, autonomy, control and embedded systems.

hero.status: Available for working-student and research roles
hero.title: Robotics & Physical AI Engineer
hero.lede: I build intelligent machines where learned autonomy meets deterministic hardware.
hero.coreStack: ROS2 · Python · C++ · MATLAB/Simulink · Control · Embedded Systems

projects.title: Selected engineering projects
projects.intro: Systems built across simulation, control, electronics and physical prototyping.

atlas.title: Sofia Atlas Travel
atlas.summary: An autonomous multilingual travel sales agent with qualification, outcome routing and an operator dashboard.
atlas.detail: Built for the TUM.ai Makeathon HappyRobot challenge. Sofia qualifies inbound callers across four languages, extracts 14 structured lead fields, routes outcomes, schedules callbacks and connects qualification events to a secure Mission Control dashboard.

ackermann.title: Autonomous Ackermann Vehicle
ackermann.summary: A ROS-based autonomous vehicle combining localization, path tracking and embedded actuation.
ackermann.detail: Implemented pure-pursuit lateral control and proportional velocity control using IMU and encoder feedback. Iterated the steering mechanism to connect simulation with a working Ackermann platform.

abs.title: Linear MPC for EV Anti-lock Braking
abs.summary: Constrained predictive control for wheel-slip regulation during electric-vehicle braking.
abs.detail: Bachelor thesis covering longitudinal vehicle and wheel dynamics, tyre-slip behaviour, controller constraints and braking performance under changing road conditions.

manipulator.title: Multi-Manipulator Pick & Place
manipulator.summary: Two coordinated manipulators, a conveyor and vision-based object tracking.
manipulator.detail: Built a coordinated workcell with two arms and a conveyor. Camera tracking and ArUco markers provided object identification and localization.

tensegrity.title: Tensegrity Rolling Robot
tensegrity.summary: Cable-actuated locomotion through controlled deformation of a tensegrity structure.
tensegrity.detail: Explored how cable actuation and structural deformation generate rolling locomotion in a lightweight compliant robotic structure at ARAtronics.

irrigation.title: Autonomous Center-Pivot Irrigation
irrigation.summary: Distributed sensing and moisture-driven control for precision irrigation.
irrigation.detail: Integrated four microcontrollers, soil-moisture sensing, PWM actuation, remote monitoring and a safety model into an autonomous irrigation prototype.

connectFour.title: Connect Four AI Agent
connectFour.summary: A game-playing agent designed around search, evaluation and adversarial decision-making.
connectFour.detail: Developed an AI opponent for Connect Four, translating game state into tactical decisions through adversarial search and board evaluation.

robco.detail: Robotic prototyping · CAD · additive manufacturing · system integration

tum.detail: Mechatronics, Robotics & Biomechanical Engineering · Artificial Intelligence in Society

gasco.detail: Industrial monitoring · operational data · predictive maintenance · reliability

guc.detail: Thesis: Linear MPC for an electric-vehicle anti-lock braking system

about.title: Bridge the layers.
about.paragraphOne: I work at the boundary between autonomy software and physical machines: sensing, control, embedded execution, mechanical integration and testing.
about.paragraphTwo: My industrial background adds a reliability-first perspective. I care about systems that survive noisy sensors, imperfect hardware and real operating constraints, not just clean simulations.

footer.title: Open to robotics, autonomy and Physical AI opportunities.
